#!/usr/bin/python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

# Contest Name: Codeforces Beta Round #6
# Problem Name: New Year and Hurry (Codeforces Round #135 (Div. 2))
# Author: Zhangqi
# Date: 2017-03-24 11:58:10
# Run Time: 15 ms
# Run Memory: 4 KB
# ZOJ Account: zhangqi71


def main():
    k1, k2, k3 = map(int, input().split())
    if k1 + k2 + k3 < 24:
        print("NO")
    else:
        print("YES")


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
